violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment must sanitize all dishes in the 3 bay sink until unit is properly adjusted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026

Minced garlic and pooled eggs were observed held at 60-64 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were assessed and placed into refrigeration to blast chill. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026
Rice cooker handles were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the exterior of ingredient bins, 3 bay sink and shelving near dish machine were observed with an accumulation of soil residue and white debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2026

The chlorine sanitizing cycle for the dishmachine was observed at 0 PPM CL. New container of chemical placed at time of inspection. Machine was primed and reading at proper concentration. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024
Cans are being used to scoop rice. PIC informed to cease practice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024
Rice cooker handle observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
Condensate from 3 door prep unit observed draining into pan. Condensate must be disposed of in proper manner. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

An employee was observed washing their hands at the 3 bay sink and not using soap. Food employees shall clean their hands in a designated hand-washing sink and not in a food preparation, mop, or ware-washing sink. -Proper hand-washing reviewed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023
The hand-washing sink in the front prep area was blocked by prep station. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023

Raw animal foods (such as raw shrimp) were observed ) thawing in 3 bay sink next to ready-to-eat noodles. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Staff moved the raw shrimp back to the walk-in cooler during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. -Proper wash, rinse, and sanitize procedures reviewed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023
